case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. VICTOR HERRERA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN ADELSON. DEFENDANT VICTOR HERRERA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THEIR REQUEST TO DISMISS THIS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
